description: Deprecated {% include %} tag → DeprecatedTag warning + enricher hint

errors.hint: Create missing file: `app/views/partials/shared/header.liquid`. Use `scaffold` tool or create manually with appropriate `{% doc %}` block.
errors.hover_docs:
### include
```liquid
{% include 'filename' %}
```

---

Deprecated because the way that variables are handled reduces performance and makes code harder to both read and maintain.

The `include` tag has been replaced by [`render`](https://documentation.platformos.com/docs/api/liquid/tags/render).

---

Renders a [partial](https://documentation.platformos.com/developer-guide/platformos-workflow/directory-structure#views-pages-layouts-and-partials).

---

Inside the partial, you can access and alter variables that are [created](https://documentation.platformos.com/docs/api/liquid/tags/variable-tags) outside of the
partial.

---

[platformOS Reference](https://documentation.platformos.com/api-reference/liquid/include)

warnings.message:
Deprecated tag 'include': Deprecated because the way that variables are handled reduces performance and makes code harder to both read and maintain.

The `include` tag has been replaced by [`render`](/docs/api/liquid/tags/render).
warnings.hint: `{% include %}` is deprecated. Replace with `{% render %}` everywhere in this file. `{% render %}` has **isolated scope** — variables from the parent are NOT inherited; pass each one explicitly: `{% render 'partial', name: name, items: items %}`. Exception: includes that pull in a module helper meant to share scope (auth, redirects) — leave those alone; the heuristic fix-generator detects this pattern and proposes guidance instead of a rename.
warnings.hover_docs:
### include
```liquid
{% include 'filename' %}
```

---

Deprecated because the way that variables are handled reduces performance and makes code harder to both read and maintain.

The `include` tag has been replaced by [`render`](https://documentation.platformos.com/docs/api/liquid/tags/render).

---

Renders a [partial](https://documentation.platformos.com/developer-guide/platformos-workflow/directory-structure#views-pages-layouts-and-partials).

---

Inside the partial, you can access and alter variables that are [created](https://documentation.platformos.com/docs/api/liquid/tags/variable-tags) outside of the
partial.

---

[platformOS Reference](https://documentation.platformos.com/api-reference/liquid/include)

fixes.description: Rename every `{% include 'X' %}` in this file to `{% render 'X', <vars> %}`. List the partial's declared `@param` names and pass each explicitly — isolated scope means undeclared vars come through as `nil`.

see_also.reason: {% include %} is deprecated in platformOS. Use {% render %} for isolated scope or {% function %} for module helpers. domain_guide(partials, gotchas) has the full deprecated-tag list.

warnings.message: This partial is not referenced by any other files
warnings.hint:
`app/views/partials/parity/deprecated.liquid` is an orphaned partial. No file in the project renders or includes it.

Two valid resolutions:
  • **Dead code** — delete the file. Use the `delete_file` fix if you're certain nothing renders it.
  • **Work in progress** — the caller hasn't been written yet. Either write the caller now (then re-validate, the warning clears), or pass `pending_files=["<caller-path>"]` to validate_code so the orphan is suppressed during the multi-file plan.

Renaming the file (e.g. via scaffold output) is the third common cause — re-run `project_map` to confirm callers point at the current name.

fixes.description: Delete `app/views/partials/parity/deprecated.liquid` — no other file in the project renders it. Re-run validate_code first if you're mid-feature; pass `pending_files=["app/views/partials/parity/deprecated.liquid"]` (or the caller's path) to suppress this warning while you write the caller.

Decide: (a) delete `app/views/partials/parity/deprecated.liquid` if it's dead, (b) write the calling page/partial if work is in progress, or (c) pass `pending_files=["<caller>"]` to validate_code while you scaffold the caller. Run `platformos_references` to confirm no rendering graph entry points at it.

warnings.message: Partial is missing a `{% doc %}` block. Document expected parameters so callers know what variables to pass. Example: `{% doc %} @param title {string} Card title {% enddoc %}`.

fix.description: Add `{% doc %}` block to document parameters

proposed_fixes.description: Add `{% doc %}` block to document parameters

Run `platformos_references` to confirm no rendering graph entry points at it.

tips.message: This file uses deprecated {% include %} tag. The scaffold tool generates code with the modern {% function %} tag. If you used scaffold to generate this code, write the scaffold output exactly as returned — do not substitute {% include %} for {% function %}.

domain_guide.rule: Partials receive ONLY explicitly passed variables — no outer scope leaks. Do NOT run {% graphql %} in rendering partials.

triggered_gotchas.message: Partials have isolated scope. Every variable used must be passed explicitly or assigned locally.
NEVER pass null for a typed parameter — use the matching empty value: '' for {string}, 0 for {number}, false for {boolean}, {} for {object}, [] for {array}.
